assertions.description: ZX Spectrum keyboard matrix using touch pads (K0-K10) with 74HC4051 multiplexers not identified as a key matrix
SD card interface (SD-01A connector Card1) not detected as a memory card interface
TFT display interface only partially detected (SPI signals found) - CS, DC, RST, and backlight control lines not grouped
Battery management subsystem (TP4057 charger + TPS2117 power mux + battery connector) not identified as a complete power path
QWIIC/I2C connectors (SM04B-SRSS-TB) not detected as I2C expansion ports
REVIEW: Touch pad matrix components (K0-K10) classified as relay type - these are PCB touch pads for a virtual ZX Spectrum keyboard, not electromechanical relays
REVIEW: Touch pad matrix components A1, V1, T1 classified as ic/varistor/transformer respectively - all are touch pad matrix elements
REVIEW: Component count shows 11 relays, 1 varistor, 1 transformer - all are actually touch pad keyboard matrix elements
